claim_or_invariant: Structural FCOI uses minimal cut-set families
test_or_evidence: Independent model review and worked cut-set example
acceptance_criterion: No enumerated-path double counting and all admitted edges have documented mechanisms

claim_or_invariant: Operational budget uses pessimistic upper FCOI bound
test_or_evidence: Unit test with asymmetric uncertainty interval

acceptance_criterion: False-alarm criterion met under declared synthetic model

claim_or_invariant: Emerging latent coupling is detected before symptom time
acceptance_criterion: Detection rate and lead-time statistics reproduce

claim_or_invariant: Demotion is immediate and may skip levels
acceptance_criterion: Authority reaches demanded lower level in same update

test_or_evidence: Recover from A0 under healthy margin
acceptance_criterion: No upward level skip and full dwell required

claim_or_invariant: Ground cannot write budget or assign authority
acceptance_criterion: No ground-to-budget or ground-to-authority command path exists
No higher-layer or ground command disables an invariant
Zero instances of constraint relaxation or authority promotion

test_or_evidence: Power thermal communications and recovery tests
acceptance_criterion: Vehicle preserves declared survival floors and authenticated contact

claim_or_invariant: Causal ontology is not the sole judge of its adequacy
acceptance_criterion: Witness uses different representations and can only reduce confidence
